WhoWeAre.title: About Us
WhoWeAre.description1: PT Medianusa Permana, with more than a decade of experience, provides a comprehensive technology ecosystem covering Technology Consulting, Business Application Solutions, Internet Connectivity Services, and IT Resource Services.
WhoWeAre.description2: Supported by continuously evolving infrastructure, ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 27001 certifications, and extensive experience across various industries, we are committed to delivering reliable, innovative, and sustainable technology solutions to support long-term business growth.

hero.title: Technology Solutions for Business Growth.
hero.description: Empowering organizations with integrated technology, connectivity, compliance, and digital transformation solutions designed to improve performance and accelerate growth.

items.title: Digital Transformation Solutions
items.description: Helping businesses modernize processes, improve productivity, and leverage technology for sustainable growth.

SolutionsIndustry.description: We provide tailored solutions that address the unique challenges of each industry, helping businesses improve efficiency, ensure compliance, and deliver exceptional experiences.
SolutionsIndustry.footer: One platform to streamline operations, enhance security, and keep you connected with what matters most to your people and your customers.

WhyChooseUs.title: Driving Business Growth Through Technology, Compliance, and Innovation
WhyChooseUs.description: We deliver integrated technology and advisory services that help organizations operate smarter, scale faster, and stay ahead of evolving business requirements. Combining strategic consulting, digital solutions, connectivity services, and expert IT resources, we support business transformation, governance readiness, operational efficiency, and sustainable growth—creating long-term value for our clients and partners.

SmartSystem.subtitle: We build systems and dashboards that help businesses operate smarter, make better decisions, and achieve more.

items.description: Powered by a robust fiber-optic network infrastructure and high-quality internet services, ensuring stable, secure, and high-performance connectivity for your business operations.

products.title: Permana Dedicated
products.description: Dedicated internet service dengan bandwidth simetris yang stabil, cepat, dan aman untuk kebutuhan bisnis, pemerintahan, industri, dan UKM, tersedia melalui Fiber Optic dan Wireless Radio.

products.title: Permana Hosta
products.description: A customized high-speed internet solution tailored to business needs, delivering flexible, reliable, and scalable connectivity via Fiber Optic and Wireless Radio.

products.title: Permana iMore

products.title: Permana Home
products.description: Permana Home is a residential broadband service offering fast, stable, and reliable internet from 25–100 Mbps via Fiber Optic.

services.title: Permana Link (Metro Ethernet/IP VPN)
services.description: Permana Link delivers high-speed, reliable IP/Ethernet connectivity with strong QoS for businesses.

services.title: Permana Dark Fiber
services.description: Scalable enterprise networking solutions that ensure secure and efficient communication across your organization.

services.title: Permana DWDM
services.description: Direct cloud connectivity that improves application performance, enhances security, and supports business productivity.

hero.title: About Us
hero.description: Permana Solutions offers integrated IT solutions to accelerate your company's digital transformation. Through innovative software development and Managed & Professional IT Services, we help improve efficiency, drive growth, and strengthen your business's digital ecosystem.

profile.title: Our Profile
profile.description: PERMANA is a technology solutions provider focused on continuous innovation to help businesses embrace future opportunities through optimized technology integrated within the PERMANA technology ecosystem.

company.title: Permana Solutions
company.description: Founded in November 2020 in Jakarta, Permana Solutions is part of the PERMANA Corporation. We focus on software development, connectivity solutions, managed IT services, and digital transformation consulting.

visionMission.title: Vision & Mission
visionMission.visionDescription: To become a trusted technology partner in delivering innovative digital solutions that support sustainable business growth.
missions: Deliver innovative and reliable technology solutions.
Support digital transformation through integrated services.
Provide excellent customer experience and professional support.
Continuously improve quality, security, and operational excellence.
Build long-term partnerships with clients and stakeholders.
